raw_cv_text:
Aisling Hunt
aisling.hunt@gmail.com · (415) 287-5642 · github.com/aislinghunt/portfolio
EDUCATION
UC Berkeley | B.S. Statistics & Computer Science May 2023
Completed coursework in Machine Learning, Statistical Inference, and Distributed Systems; GPA: 3.7
Capstone: Built recommendation engine analyzing 2.1M user interactions across e-commerce platform using
collaborative filtering
EXPERIENCE
Stripe | Data Science Intern June 2023 - August 2023
Developed a fraud detection model using LightGBM that reduced false positives by 22% while maintaining 98% true
positive rate, impacting 50K+ daily transactions
Built automated ETL pipeline in Airflow to ingest and validate payment data from 3 disparate sources, reducing
manual data preparation time by 35 hours/week
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver A/B testing framework that analyzed 12 product experiments and
informed roadmap prioritization
DataRobot | Junior Data Scientist September 2023 - Present
Engineered 18 novel features for enterprise customer churn prediction model, achieving 0.84 AUC and enabling 8%
improvement in model accuracy
Automated weekly reporting dashboard using Python and Tableau that tracks 25+ KPIs across 15 client segments,
reducing manual report generation by 12 hours
Deployed 3 production ML models using Docker and AWS SageMaker, implementing real-time monitoring that
flagged 6 data drift incidents before impacting predictions
PROJECTS
Customer Lifetime Value Prediction | Python, scikit-learn, Pandas, PostgreSQL January 2023 - March 2023
Constructed regression model predicting customer CLV within ±$50 range for 100K subscription customers using 15
engineered behavioral features
Implemented hyperparameter tuning with GridSearch and cross-validation, improving RMSE by 28% from baseline
model
COVID-19 Sentiment Analysis (Open Source Contribution) | Python, NLTK, spaCy, August 2022 - October 2022
Matplotlib, GitHub
Contributed NLP preprocessing module to open-source project analyzing 50K+ Twitter posts about pandemic,
merged 2 pull requests
Optimized text tokenization pipeline to process 1M documents in <4 minutes (3x faster than original implementation)
Time Series Forecasting: Stock Market Analysis | Python, ARIMA, Prophet, TensorFlow April 2023 - May 2023
LSTM, Matplotlib
Trained ensemble model combining ARIMA, Prophet, and LSTM networks to forecast S&P 500 closing prices with
92% directional accuracy
Generated comprehensive analysis report with 8 visualizations and backtested strategy achieving 14% annual
return
Exploratory Data Analysis: Kaggle Housing Competition | Python, Pandas, Seaborn, February 2023 - March 2023
scikit-learn, Kaggle
Analyzed 1,460 housing records and engineered 12 features addressing multicollinearity, ranked in top 18% of
competition (2,400+ participants)
Created 15 publication-quality visualizations revealing 5 key price drivers, achieving final RMSE of 0.125
EXTRACURRICULAR
Berkeley Data Science Student Association | Member & Workshop Volunteer 2021 - 2023
Led 3 hands-on workshops teaching 60+ students practical ML workflows with real datasets
Mentored 5 first-year students transitioning into data science career path
Women in Data Science (WiDS) | Community Participant & Hackathon Winner 2022 - Present
Placed 2nd in 2023 WiDS Datathon (300+ teams globally) building classification model for healthcare equity
Actively networked with 100+ professionals through monthly meetups and mentorship events
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages – Python (Advanced), SQL (Advanced), R (Intermediate)
Technologies – Python, SQL, scikit-learn, TensorFlow, XGBoost, Pandas, NumPy
Tools – Jupyter, Git, AWS (EC2, S3, SageMaker), Docker, Airflow, Tableau, DBeaver
name: Aisling Hunt

projects.name: Time Series Forecasting: Stock Market Analysis
projects.subtitle: Python, ARIMA, Prophet, TensorFlow

projects.subtitle: Python, Pandas, Seaborn
